message: Jake
Yuriko
Kristy
Serial Murder Case
Ginny
I’m back.
Ahh, I don't really get what's going on anymore.
Sigh.
Good grief.
Boss, that makes you sound like an old person.
By the way, what was the deal with Gabriela?
Yeah?
Well,
I found out about her last customer.
Gulp.
So, what kind of guy is he?
According to her,
the last customer was Tony Ford.
Tony Ford!? The guy who's a director or a stage actor!
I don't care, but you’re explaining it like it’s a lecture.
So it turned out to be true.
True, huh?
Was there something on your mind?
Hehehe, my gray cells are whispering that Tony is the culprit.
No way, that’s such a leap in logic.
Shut up! Don't you trust my brain cells?
Sorry, but no.
Boss,
it'll be too late to regret it later.
Good work.
Thank you.
Look.
talk
listen
think
call
move
System
the surroundings
Meryl's request
about

Günter
Gabriella

As I do this, I can faintly hear the hustle and bustle outside. It's such a peaceful afternoon.
Somehow feels narrow yet spacious
It’s a mysterious office.
In this office, usually
there are only two of us
so when we sit, the view opens up and feels nice.
But this scenery is not appreciated.
What on earth
are they doing?
I'm glad it's quiet, but not knowing what they're doing is kind of scary.
I hope they’re not accessing the internet and doing something incomprehensible.
Boss, you don't trust what I'm saying, do you?
The last customer is the culprit.
That’s just too simple. Besides, I don’t see that Tony as the kind of guy who would do that.
Buh.
Ugh, Boss is backing up a guy like that.
Fine, the one who’ll cry later will be the Boss!
Even if you say that.
Ah.
Ugh, why do guys always cover for each other?
Huff.
Oh, when I met Cindy on FLIX, I totally disturbed Gloria, right?
Well, at that time,
I was.
blaming others again.
But, you know, that completely ruined Gloria's request.
Aren’t you happy that a lot of things are happening lately?
Ugh, I dislike that gloomy topic.
Ah.
My head hurts.
Saying that now doesn't help.
We've already come too far to retreat.
Oh, that line was nice.
It felt like I became the star of a movie.
What do you mean by dodging?
Because.
my gray cells have dried up.
Sobbing.
Boss, what should we do?
How are you doing?
There's nothing going on for now, I think.
I hope it keeps getting better.
I'll try to find some time to go out and have fun too.
I haven't even heard from someone like Guy.
Right?
He totally hates it.
It's fine, someone like him doesn't really understand people's pain.
Well, Guy is technically my friend, you know. It hurts my heart when he's talked about badly.
That's true, there's no point in complaining unless you say it to the person.
I wonder where Guy is and what he's doing.
Boss, do you remember what happened at FLIX?
FLIX, is that the place we went to recently?
Yeah, that's right. Cindy said her real name was Ariana back then.
So you're saying she might be Meryl's daughter?
Yes, yes, yes!
Uh.
Hmm.
According to my theory, if Cindy equals Ariana Kleiberg, then having those two meet as parent and child completes the request!
Well...
I don’t really think there's such a good deal out there.
You're so negative, Boss.
That's why you're living a lonely life without a partner at your age.
I absolutely believe there's no way that's wrong.
Gloria is pretty hard to understand, right? What she’s thinking is totally beyond me.
Haha.
It’s kind of sad for Gloria to be told that.
Oh, I just voiced what the Boss was thinking.
It feels like you should at least give a call.
I just have this creepy feeling about Günter.
That’s a rude thing to say!
Why would you think something like that?
Well, I don't know, just kind of.
Huff.
Ugh.
You really shouldn't judge people just like that, honestly!
It's true that you look kind of uptight, but I really think it's not good to judge people by their faces.
Well, it's not that I'm saying something about your face, but it's more about the vibe I don't like.
Boss, is there something troubling your heart, perhaps?
No.
I don't think there's anything like that.
Are you really sure about that?
Can you really say that with certainty?
There’s a vibe that makes you think the teacher can see right into your heart.
The information about Gabriela is certainly accurate, right?
Of course, it is!
You must have been managing the schedule or something.
If that's the case, then Tonny is indeed the culprit.
Hehe, I'm totally sharp like Holmes!
For Gabriela's sake, we need to quickly
find out who did it!
So Tonny Ford is finally going to be arrested, huh?
We don't even know if he's the criminal yet.
No, he surely must have done it. That woman's enemy should be judged by the law.
We have to meet Tonny and confront him.
You've met Tonny, right?
Yeah.
I met up, but
it kind of felt like I was being sidestepped in the conversation.
That was the vibe, you know.
That's, that's not okay!
You’ve got to be assertive with guys like that!
So,
is going.
No way, the other person might be a murderer!
This kind of thing is a man's job.
Tch, this is reverse sexual harassment.
Boss, muster up your courage and do your best!
I'm cheering you on here.
Come on, Boss! Let's give it our all for the women of the world.
Tony's vibe is definitely shady, right?
No, more importantly, it seems like he’s on drugs or something.
We can't have a proper conversation.
I-Is it drugs this time!? Seriously, he's just a total villain!
I absolutely think Tony is the culprit.
Thinking about Meryl's request is seriously depressing. What should I do if he can't be found?
Cindy had the name Ariana, but for her to be Meryl's daughter would be...
...unlikely.
I'd be happy if he recovered as is, but a fundamental solution seems impossible until the matter with Guy is resolved.
Thinking about her reminds me how fragile the human heart is.
She’s going to counseling, so she should be okay.
Cindy.
She vanished from the shop with the boy who seems to be her boyfriend.
What kind of reason led her to change her hairstyle and hide the fact that she’s Cindy while getting close to the boy?
Is she planning on not returning to work?
Gloria barged into FLIX.
Despite desperately searching for Cindy, she ended up escaping.
When you think about it, Gloria might also be a pitiful woman.
Also,
though I don't speak ill of Doctor Gunter, I just can't bring myself to like him.
To put it accurately, he gives me a sense of suspicion.
I wonder where the anxiety I feel about him comes from.
He seemed really tired, but could it be that he got some new worries?
If I could at least know whether he's alive or dead, I think I would feel a bit more at ease.
Tony was incoherent, possibly from doing drugs.
What he was saying was like a broken person state, right?
I met with Tony but ended up coming back without asking anything. I need to get him to spill next time.
Just because Tony was the last customer, I don't think that directly ties him to the culprit, but I have to meet him and hear what he has to say.
From what Gabriela told me, it seems that Jennifer and
had a bad relationship.
I never would have imagined that Jennifer's name would come up in a place like this.
But, even if Jennifer hated
her, could she really kill Ginny?
Is there really any basis for that kind of story?
I hate to say this, but Jennifer seems to be the type who causes various problems.
※※※ It's a bug ※※※
